codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original anchor-kind canonicalization change and the follow-up fix. The original canonicalization logic correctly unifies legacy/current provider anchor labels, and the fix removes the early-return lifecycle hole so previously carried-forward findings now transition correctly when a reviewed path comes back clean or a canonicalized deleted-path finding disappears.

summary: Reviewed both commits, both handoffs, and both transcript skeletons for the original feature and its fix. The fix in internal/llm/provider.go now checks reviewed/deleted scope before bailing out on existing last_seen_run_id values, and the new DB-backed regressions cover the exact reviewed-clean and deleted-path carry-forward scenarios from the prior failure, so this review now passes.
